macro.title: Homebuying Demand Ticks Up, Mortgage Rates Tick Down
macro.what: More homeowners are putting their houses on the market, with new listings increasing for the second week in a row after five straight months of declines
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Fed Holds Rates Steady, But Rare Dissents Signal Cloudy Outlook For Future Path
macro.what: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at its April 29 meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Iowa just reset property taxes to assist first-time homebuyers
housing.what: Home builders now have a sharper incentive to pitch to prospective first-time homebuyers in Iowa after lawmakers passed a sweeping property tax overhaul on Sunday, the final day of the legislative session
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: How real estate agent Deba Douglas turned buyer education into a 100-transaction business
housing.what: After 16 years in education, Deba Douglas walked away from the classroom because she saw a different kind of learning gap.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: View Homes: new division presidents in Colorado and San Antonio
housing.what: Ben Harris and Michael Copeland have joined View Homes as division presidents for Colorado and San Antonio, respectively, while Alyson Benn has been named vice president of corporate marketing, the Builder 100 homebuilder announced Monday
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Nearly Half of Americans Oppose AI Data Centers in Their Neighborhoods, While 38% Support Them
housing.what: Young Americans are more likely than older generations to support data centers in their backyards, according to a Redfin survey
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The Price Point: What $1 Million Buys in These Charming Small Cities
housing.what: In this edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re looking at the million-dollar market
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: San Francisco’s Luxury Home Sales Jump 22% As Median Price Nears $7M
housing.what: Luxury home sales are surging in San Francisco, the epicenter of the AI boom, pushing the median sale price to the highest March level on record
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: eXp’s Wendy Forsythe on how women can break into the C-suite
notables.what: Forsythe urged women to not wait until the most comfortable moments to make big moves, and to not be afraid to "build their own tables."
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Century 21’s Mike Miedler: Recruiting Latino talent is a growth strategy, not a diversity talking point
notables.what: Mike Miedler said Latino homebuyer demand is rising and cited 13% Latino NAR membership, urging pipeline and training investment.

notables.title: Stanley Martin closes on its $221M United Homes acquisition
notables.what: Stanley Martin closed its $221M all-cash acquisition of United Homes, paying $1.18 per share and expanding its Southeast footprint.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: eLEND hires Roman Ramora as chief technology and innovation officer

notables.title: April HMBS issuance rises to $525 million, HECM dips
notables.what: HMBS issuance totaled $525 million in April, up from $441 million in March, while HECM endorsements fell 1.4% to 2,088 loans.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Recruiting Insight updates belief stack manual for recruiting
